safe_mode_desc: Clear all Python environment variables to prevent system Python interference
cn_mirror_desc: Enable PyPI / Hugging Face China mirror for faster downloads
proxy_desc: Optional local proxy for downloads and install scripts
attention_default_desc: Use the runtime's default attention mechanism
attention_prefer_flash_desc: Prefer FA2 when running inside the FlashAttention 2 runtime
install_prerequisites: Initialize the project-local runtime first, then install dependencies after the status changes to Initialized.
install_recommended_runtime: This machine is best matched with: {runtime}
dependencies_page_desc: Pre-download large wheels and project dependencies into a local cache so runtime installation can reuse them more reliably.
dependencies_progress_idle: No dependency cache task is running right now.
dependencies_runtime_not_ready: Initialize or repair this runtime first before caching dependencies.
dependencies_batch_desc: Pre-download large runtime dependencies in batches so later installs can reuse local cache first.
install_prepare_runtime_hint: Not initialized yet. One-click initialization will prepare: {dir}
install_incomplete_runtime_hint: A runtime directory was found, but it looks incomplete. Click Initialize to repair: {dir}
install_broken_runtime_hint: The runtime skeleton looks broken. Replace this folder with a complete embeddable Python first, then initialize again: {dir}
install_ready_runtime_hint: The runtime is initialized and ready for dependency installation.
install_help_desc: The launcher does not install packages into system Python by default, so first-run setup should initialize a project-local runtime before installing dependencies.
install_help_step_runtime_desc: Start by preparing the runtime recommended for this machine: {runtime}
install_help_step_python_desc: Click Initialize and the launcher will prepare the bundled portable Python in: {dir}
install_help_step_finish_desc: After dependencies are installed, return to Launch, choose a runtime, and start the trainer.
install_batch_desc: Select multiple runtimes and the launcher will initialize them if needed, then install them one by one.
install_batch_select_runtime: Select this runtime for batch install
install_summary_success_desc: This runtime has been selected automatically. You can return to Launch and start using it now.
install_summary_failed_desc: Check the install log above and confirm that the local Python runtime and dependencies are prepared correctly.
about_footer: Forked from 秋葉 lora-scripts · Modified by Lulynx
launch_preflight_ready: The current configuration is ready to launch.
launch_preflight_fix_required: Please fix the remaining issues before launch.
onboarding_desc: If this is your first time opening the launcher, follow these 3 steps to prepare a runtime before training.
onboarding_step_runtime_desc: Start with the runtime recommended for this machine: {runtime}
onboarding_step_python_desc: Place the prepared local Python runtime in: {dir}
onboarding_step_install_desc: Open the Install page, finish dependency installation, then return to Launch.
update_available_banner_desc: Open the About page to review update info and run the project updater.
update_channel_desc: Choose between stable and beta releases.
update_latest_status: You're already on the latest version
runtime_missing_msg: No Python runtime detected for {runtime}. Please install it first.
runtime_auto_desc: Prefer SageAttention runtime if installed, otherwise use standard
no_runtime_installed: No installed runtimes detected, please install one first
select_runtime_first: Please select an installed runtime on the Runtime page first
launch_sidebar_hint: Launch, stop, and kill controls now live in the left sidebar.
global_run_runtime_missing: The selected runtime is not installed yet. Prepare it on the Install page first.
global_run_preflight_blocked: Preflight still has blocking issues. Return to Launch and fix them first.
global_run_installing_hint: A runtime install is in progress, so launching is temporarily disabled.
global_run_kill_warning: Click again to force-kill the trainer and its child processes. Use Stop first if a normal shutdown is enough.
managed_desc: Connect your preset server to cache hosted training presets for 24 hours and import them into your local saved configs.
managed_settings_desc: Enter the hosted preset server URL and API key. Saving will trigger a refresh attempt.
managed_not_configured: No hosted preset server is configured yet.
managed_not_configured_desc: Add a server URL and API key first. Hosted presets will appear here afterwards.
managed_empty: No presets are available right now.
managed_empty_desc: If the server is configured, the remote side may not have any public training presets yet, or the API is still missing.
managed_preview_unavailable: This preset did not include a previewable config snippet.
managed_import_notice_desc: Importing saves the preset into your local saved configs and keeps the previous managed import as a rollback backup.
managed_import_success: Hosted preset imported into local saved config: {name}
managed_revert_success: Reverted to the previous managed import backup: {name}
detection_complete: Detection complete: {installed} installed, {partial} partial, {missing} not installed
extension_note: Manage installed plugin extensions. Changes take effect on next trainer launch.
